tutorial.first_build: [ZH] Tap a building slot to construct your first building.
tutorial.draw_cards: [ZH] Draw cards at the start of each turn.
tutorial.play_card: [ZH] Tap a card, then tap a target to play it.
tutorial.energy: [ZH] Cards cost energy. You regenerate {0} per turn.
tutorial.hero_summon: [ZH] You've earned enough shards! Summon your new hero.
hero.lyra_thornveil.name: [ZH] Lyra Thornveil
hero.lyra_thornveil.desc: [ZH] A nature mage who weaves vines and thorns to protect allies.
hero.kael_ashwalker.name: [ZH] Kael Ashwalker
hero.kael_ashwalker.desc: [ZH] A fire sorcerer who channels the fury of the Ashen Wastes.
hero.thane_ironhold.name: [ZH] Thane Ironhold
hero.thane_ironhold.desc: [ZH] An armored defender of the Iron Legion, unbreakable in battle.
hero.zara_voidweaver.name: [ZH] Zara Voidweaver
hero.zara_voidweaver.desc: [ZH] A void mystic who bends shadow to confuse and weaken foes.
hero.rowan_stoneward.name: [ZH] Rowan Stoneward
hero.rowan_stoneward.desc: [ZH] A steadfast guardian with the strength of living stone.
hero.mira_frostbane.name: [ZH] Mira Frostbane
hero.mira_frostbane.desc: [ZH] An ice mage whose frost slows all who oppose her.
hero.vex_shadowstrike.name: [ZH] Vex Shadowstrike
hero.vex_shadowstrike.desc: [ZH] A shadow assassin who strikes from the darkness.
hero.sera_dawnblade.name: [ZH] Sera Dawnblade
hero.sera_dawnblade.desc: [ZH] A holy knight radiating divine light to heal and smite.
hero.grim_bonecrusher.name: [ZH] Grim Bonecrusher
hero.grim_bonecrusher.desc: [ZH] A berserker who grows stronger as battle rages.
hero.nyx_stormcaller.name: [ZH] Nyx Stormcaller
hero.nyx_stormcaller.desc: [ZH] A lightning mage who chains destruction across the field.
